summary: SSHR (Self-Service HR) Module testing completed. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. New features include SSHR module on homepage, payslips page, company documents CRUD, and HR approval queue.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/hr/company-documents - Creates new document with validation
Backend: GET /api/hr/company-documents/expiring - Returns expiring/expired documents with categories
Backend: GET /api/ess/pending-approvals - Returns pending leave/regularization requests
Frontend: SSHR module icon appears on homepage (teal color)
Frontend: SSHR Dashboard (/sshr) loads with ESS widgets
Frontend: My Payslips page (/sshr/payslips) loads correctly with year selector
Frontend: Company Documents page (/hr/documents) loads correctly
Frontend: Add Document modal opens and creates document successfully
Frontend: Document table shows status indicators (Valid/Expiring Soon/Expired)
Frontend: HR Approval Queue page (/hr/approvals) loads correctly
Frontend: Leave Requests and Regularization tabs work in Approval Queue
Frontend: Dashboard page no longer has ESS tabs (correctly removed)
critical_code_review_comments: SSHR module correctly implemented as separate navigation section with teal color
Company Documents page has proper expiry tracking with visual status indicators
HR Approval Queue properly shows pending leave and regularization requests with tabs
My Payslips page handles empty state gracefully with proper message
Dashboard page correctly cleaned up - ESS tabs removed to avoid confusion
All CRUD operations for company documents work correctly via frontend and backend
seed_data_creation: One test document was created during testing and cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSHR module fully implemented and tested. Features include: 1) SSHR icon on homepage that navigates to /sshr dashboard with ESS section (leave application, attendance regularization, leave balance widgets), 2) My Payslips page at /sshr/payslips showing payslip history with year filter, 3) Company Documents page at /hr/documents with full CRUD operations and expiry tracking, 4) HR Approval Queue at /hr/approvals for reviewing leave and regularization requests. Email notifications are intentionally skipped (will be added with SMTP later as per user request).

feature_verification.SSHR icon on homepage: WORKING - Teal colored icon in My Self-Service section
feature_verification.GET /api/hr/company-documents: WORKING - Returns list of company documents
feature_verification.GET /api/hr/company-documents/expiring: WORKING - Returns expired and expiring_soon categories
feature_verification.GET /api/ess/payslips: WORKING - Returns user's payslips (empty for users without payroll data)
feature_verification.GET /api/ess/pending-approvals: WORKING - Returns leave and regularization requests for approval
feature_verification./sshr dashboard: WORKING - ESSSection component with all widgets
feature_verification./sshr/payslips: WORKING - Payslips page with year selector and summary cards
feature_verification./hr/documents: WORKING - Full CRUD with status indicators and search/filter
feature_verification./hr/approvals: WORKING - Tabs for leave requests and regularization
